response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, cloud-native architectures (e.g., Kubernetes, AWS CDK), and leadership (mentoring, dev-ops). However, his background lacks direct experience in C++ (only brief mention in legacy roles), large-scale distributed systems (micro-services at high scale), or formal technical leadership in cloud compute platforms. His strengths lie in web/mobile systems and DevOps tooling, not the core requirements of this role.
strengths: Strong background in cloud-native architectures (Kubernetes, AWS, Docker) and DevOps practices
Proven leadership in mentoring teams and setting engineering best practices (e.g., CI/CD, TDD)
Experience with scalable systems (micro-services handling millions of requests/sec) and cross-functional roles
concerns: Limited C++ experience (only legacy roles) and no specific focus on compute/storage hardware architecture
No direct experience leading cloud compute platform strategy or balancing short/long-term technical needs
Background skewed toward web/mobile systems rather than internal cloud infrastructure for product engineering
